translations.en: We’re going back in since it’s raining.
translations.es: Volvemos a entrar porque está lloviendo.
translations.de: Wir gehen wieder rein, weil es regnet.
translations.zh-Hans: 下雨了，我们还是进去吧。
translations.pt: Vamos entrar de novo, porque está chovendo.
translations.tr: Yağmur yağdığı için içeri geri dönelim.
translations.vi: Trời mưa nên mình vào lại trong nhà.
translations.ar: بما أنها تمطر، فلنعد إلى الداخل.
translations.nl: Laten we weer naar binnen gaan, want het regent.
translations.hu: Menjünk vissza, mert esik az eső.
translations.hi: बारिश हो रही है, तो चलो वापस अंदर चलते हैं।
translations.nb: Vi går inn igjen siden det regner.
translations.id: Karena sedang hujan, kita masuk lagi.
translations.sv: Vi går in igen eftersom det regnar.
translations.ro: Hai să intrăm înăuntru, fiindcă plouă.
translations.da: Lad os gå ind igen, for det regner.
translations.ja: 雨が降っているから、中に戻ろう。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun meaning ‘we/one’; here used as colloquial ‘we’.
Main verb in the present indicative (3rd sg with ‘on’): ‘to go back/come in’.
Subordinating conjunction ‘since/because’; elided before a vowel.
Subject pronoun; here the impersonal ‘it’ used with weather verbs.
Impersonal verb ‘to rain’, present indicative 3rd singular.

translations.de: Wenn du schon da bist, hilf mir.
translations.pt: Já que você está aqui, me ajuda.
translations.vi: Vì bạn đang ở đây, hãy giúp tôi.
translations.nl: Aangezien je hier bent, help me.
translations.hu: Ha már itt vagy, segíts nekem.
translations.hi: जब तुम यहाँ हो, तो मेरी मदद करो।
translations.nb: Siden du er here, hjelp meg.
translations.id: Karena kamu di sini, tolong bantu aku.
translations.sv: När du ändå är här, hjälp mig.
translations.cs: Když už jsi tady, pomoz mi.
translations.da: Når du nu er her, så hjælp mig.
translations.fi: Kun kerran olet täällä, auta minua.
translations.ja: ここにいるなら、手伝って。

tokens.explanation: Subordinating conjunction introducing a causal clause.
Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Copula ‘to be’, present indicative 2nd singular, linking the subject to a predicate.
Deictic adverb of place (‘here/there’); predicate complement with the copula.
Imperative 2nd singular of ‘aider’; directive to the addressee.
Tonic pronoun used enclitically after an imperative (orthographically joined by a hyphen).

sentences.target: Je paie, puisque j'ai oublié ton cadeau.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pɛ pɥisk ʒe ublije tɔ̃ kado./

translations.fr: Je paie, puisque j'ai oublié ton cadeau.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pɛ pɥisk ʒe ublije tɔ̃ kado./
translations.en: I’ll pay since I forgot your present.
translations.es: Pago yo, ya que olvidé tu regalo.
translations.de: Ich zahle, weil ich dein Geschenk vergessen habe.
translations.it: Pago io, visto che ho dimenticato il tuo regalo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我忘了你的礼物，所以我来买单。
translations.yue: 我唔記得帶你份禮物，所以由我埋單。
translations.ru: Я заплачу, раз я забыл твой подарок.
translations.pt: Eu pago, já que esqueci seu presente.
translations.he: אני أשלם כי שכחתי את המתנה שלך.
translations.tr: Hesabı ben ödeyeceğim, çünkü hediyeni unuttum.
translations.vi: Để tôi trả tiền vì tôi quên quà của bạn.
translations.nl: Ik betaal, omdat ik je cadeau ben vergeten.
translations.uk: Я заплачу, бо я забув твій подарунок.
translations.hu: Én fizetek, mivel elfelejtettem az ajándékodat.
translations.hi: मैं भुगतान कर दूँगा, क्योंकि मैं तुम्हारा तोहफ़ा भूल गया हूँ।
translations.pl: Ja zapłacę, bo zapomniałem twojego prezentu.
translations.el: Εγώ θα πληρώσω, αφού ξέχασα το δώρο σου.
translations.nb: Jeg betaler siden jeg glemte gaven din.
translations.id: Biar aku yang bayar karena aku lupa hadiahmu.
translations.sv: Jag betalar eftersom jag glömde din present.
translations.ro: Plătesc eu, fiindcă am uitat cadoul tău.
translations.cs: Zaplatím, protože jsem zapomněl na tvůj dárek.
translations.da: Jeg betaler, fordi jeg glemte din gave.
translations.ja: 君のプレゼントを忘れたから、私が払う。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb ‘to pay’, present indicative 1st singular.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a causal subordinate clause.
Elided form of ‘je’ before a vowel; subject pronoun.
Auxiliary ‘to have’, present indicative 1st singular, forming the perfect with the participle.
Past participle of ‘oublier’; part of the passé composé with ‘ai’.
Second-person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular agreeing with ‘cadeau’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘oublié’.

sentences.target: Reste ici, puisque c'est plus sûr.

translations.fr: Reste ici, puisque c'est plus sûr.
translations.es: Quédate aquí, porque es más seguro.
translations.de: Bleib hier, weil es sicherer ist.
translations.it: Resta qui, perché è più sicuro.
translations.yue: 留喺呢度，因為咁樣安全啲。
translations.ru: Останься здесь, потому что так безопаснее.
translations.pt: Fica aqui, porque é mais seguro.
translations.he: תישאר כאן, כי זה יותר בטוח.
translations.tr: Burada kal, çünkü bu daha güvenli.
translations.vi: Ở đây đi, vì như vậy an toàn hơn.
translations.nl: Blijf hier, want dat is veiliger.
translations.hi: यहीं रहो, क्योंकि यह ज़्यादा सुरक्षित है।
translations.pl: Zostań tutaj, bo tak jest bezpieczniej.
translations.el: Μείνε εδώ, γιατί είναι πιο ασφαλές.
translations.nb: Bli her, for det er tryggere.
translations.id: Tetap di sini, karena ini lebih aman.
translations.sv: Stanna här, för det är säkrare.
translations.ro: Rămâi aici, fiindcă este mai sigur.
translations.cs: Zůstaň tady, protože je to bezpečnější.
translations.da: Bliv her, for det er mere sikkert.
translations.fi: Pysy täällä, koska se on turvallisempaa.
translations.ja: ここにいて、こっちのほうが安全だから。

tokens.explanation: Imperative 2nd singular of ‘rester’; directive.
Adverb of place specifying location.
Subordinating conjunction introducing the reason.
Elided neutral pronoun ‘ce’ before vowel; subject of the copular clause.
Copula ‘to be’, present indicative 3rd singular.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective ‘sûr’.
Predicate adjective (masc. sg.) complement of the copula.

fu: /ʒə pɛ pɥisk ʒe ublije tɔ̃ kado./

Reste ici, puisque c'est plus sûr.
ipa: /ʒə pɛ pɥisk ʒe ublije tɔ̃ kado./
en: We’re going back in since it’s raining.
I’ll pay since I forgot your present.
